SEARCH
Package BLL

Class TypeChartBLL

java.lang.Object
BLL.TypeChartBLL
public class TypeChartBLL extends Object
Business Logic Layer (BLL) class for managing Type Chart Entries.

    Deletes a type after confirming the type exists.

    Retrieves the list of all type chart entries.

      Constructor for TypeChartBLL.

      connection - the database connection

  • Method Details

    • addType

      public boolean addType(String typeName)
      Adds a new type by validating and passing the details to the DAL layer.
      Parameters:
      typeName - the name of the type
      Returns:
      true if type chart entry added, false otherwise

    • deleteType

      public boolean deleteType(int typeId)
      Deletes a type after confirming the type exists.
      Parameters:
      typeId - the ID of the type to delete
      Returns:
      true if the type was successfully deleted, false otherwise

    • getAllTypeChartEntries

      public List<TypeChartEntry> getAllTypeChartEntries()
      Retrieves the list of all type chart entries.
      Returns:
      a list of all type chart entries

    • getTypeNameById

      public String getTypeNameById(int typeId)
      Retrieves the type's name by its ID. Needed for confirmation in type deletion.
      Parameters:
      typeId - the ID of the type
      Returns:
      the type's name, or null if no type is found
